name: Tablo Kanban
description: Bookmarks bar and Kanban board as new tab page

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://www.googleapis.com https://cloud-api.yandex.net https://geocoding-api.open-meteo.com https://api.open-meteo.com https://www.google.com; img-src 'self' https://www.google.com https://*.gstatic.com data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
